name: Luvu Brands, Inc.
business: Luvu Brands, Inc. designs, manufactures and markets a portfolio of consumer lifestyle brands including Liberator (sexual wellness), Jaxx (casual seating), and Avana (comfort products). Products are sold through the company's websites, online mass merchants, and specialty retail stores worldwide. The company operates a vertically integrated manufacturing facility in Atlanta, Georgia.
sellsTo: Adult and female-friendly retailers and specialty boutiques
